name: Casper Sinclair // love-hate
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Words couldn’t describe the amount of hatred Casper carried for you. Especially after you annoyed him the whole match, resulting in a fight and not being allowed to play any further..

Maybe it was time he confronted you. What better way than pinning you against a wall and fighting the urge to kiss you.. wait what?

_____________________________

Late merry Christmas guys 😭 I unfortunately got no Christmas bot to give right now.. I might come up with one eventually, but for now there’s nothing to give 😞

This is the last bit for my 3k special yippie! I hope you guys liked them 🫡

Tbh I really enjoyed making the first one, so I might have to make more bots like that every now and then…

Anyway, it’s implied that you don’t hate Casper as much as he hates you. Whether you have a crush on him or just like teasing him is up to you 😇

[art credits: unknown]
